race.comment: Open race. OLLANDIA BEACH (2) has been okay in two runs back, unsuited coming back in trip last time at Seymour. Should be ready to peak now and should give a sight. SHYAMALAN (3) is a consistent sort on the quick turnaround. Camped just off the lead at Sapphire Coast last start and boxed on well, finishing just second from the winner. Has claims. SUPER PARADISE (1) finished tenth two runs ago at Pakenham but found form last time out when he scored by 0.9 lengths over 1600m at Albury. Going well, can figure again. MOCKRIDGE (5) returned from a spell and was easily accounted for when 12th over 1400m at Geelong. Fitter and can show more.
